# Why QuintessenceLabs?  
We Are the Global Leader in Quantum Cybersecurity
##  QuintessenceLabs is at the Forefront of Quantum Cybersecurity
Our capabilities extend from quantum-enabled key generation, crypto-agile key and policy management through to quantum key distribution, helping you build a quantum-resilient future for your organization.
[Our Capabilities](https://www.quintessencelabs.com)
![](https://www.quintessencelabs.com/hs-fs/hubfs/q-labs%20-%20RECTANGLE%20body%20images%20\(2\).png?width=800&height=540&name=q-labs%20-%20RECTANGLE%20body%20images%20\(2\).png)
## What Sets Us Apart
QuintessenceLabs’ portfolio of modular security products addresses the most difficult security challenges facing organizations, helping implement robust security strategies to protect data today and in the future.
[ Our Technology ](https://www.quintessencelabs.com/why-us#technology)[ Our Company ](https://www.quintessencelabs.com/why-us#company)[ Our People ](https://www.quintessencelabs.com/why-us#people)
## Our Technology
![2022-07-QLabs_icons_qRand](https://www.quintessencelabs.com/hs-fs/hubfs/2022-07-QLabs_icons_qRand.png?width=201&height=201&name=2022-07-QLabs_icons_qRand.png)
### Seamless Integration
The QuintessenceLabs world-class products incorporate advances in quantum science to deliver highly capable cybersecurity solutions.
![2022-07-QLabs_icons_qOptica-1](https://www.quintessencelabs.com/hs-fs/hubfs/2022-07-QLabs_icons_qOptica-1.png?width=201&height=201&name=2022-07-QLabs_icons_qOptica-1.png)
### Harnessing Quantum Science
Our products seamlessly integrate with existing devices in your security infrastructure to easily and cost-effectively strengthen your data protection.
![2022-07-QLabs_icons_TSF-1](https://www.quintessencelabs.com/hs-fs/hubfs/2022-07-QLabs_icons_TSF-1.png?width=201&height=201&name=2022-07-QLabs_icons_TSF-1.png)
### Solid Security Foundation
Our TSF 400 is a highly secure crypto-agile platform combining our powerful key and policy manager, our high-speed quantum random number generator, and a FIPS-validated hardware security module, in a single centralized solution.
[ Learn More ](https://www.quintessencelabs.com/our-technology)

          <span class="icon__glyph">
            
              <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 512 512"><path fill="currentColor" d="M464 256h-80v-64c0-35.3 28.7-64 64-64h8c13.3 0 24-10.7 24-24V56c0-13.3-10.7-24-24-24h-8c-88.4 0-160 71.6-160 160v240c0 26.5 21.5 48 48 48h128c26.5 0 48-21.5 48-48V304c0-26.5-21.5-48-48-48zm-288 0H96v-64c0-35.3 28.7-64 64-64h8c13.3 0 24-10.7 24-24V56c0-13.3-10.7-24-24-24h-8C71.6 32 0 103.6 0 192v240c0 26.5 21.5 48 48 48h128c26.5 0 48-21.5 48-48V304c0-26.5-21.5-48-48-48z"></path></svg>
